name: Baba Ganouj
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook eggplants whole on all sides, turning as necessary until they are soft throughout and the skin is charred.
2. Set aside to cool for 1 hour.
3. Peel eggplants and discard the skin.
4. In a mixing bowl, add lemon juice and tahini. Blend well.
5. Add salt to taste.
6. Finely chop the garlic clove and add it to the mashed eggplant.
7. Stir well and chill.
8. To serve, place in a flat serving dish and garnish with parsley.
9. Pour olive oil on top.
